diff_quality.notes: The self-heal fix is a single-line `height: 100%` on `.cc-msg-list`, scoped and idiomatic; the summary shows disciplined restraint (no overflow/fixed-height hacks, sibling selectors left frozen). Broader integration is documented in README: no client CometChat secrets (App ID/region/token fetched at runtime from backend POST /cometchat/token, REST key server-side), loginWithAuthToken, group + direct 1:1 threads, group/1:1 voice+video, dispatcher intervene, admin audit via backend. package-lock churn (many `-dev: true` removals, react-markdown/micromark/syntax-highlighter subtree) is transitive fallout of the uikit-react dep, not an unrelated refactor. Only .env.example is present; no committed secrets.

queries.query: React UI Kit message list container height layout won't scroll flex CSS embed

coverage_gaps: No docs-mcp page or troubleshooting entry documents the container-height contract for a hand-composed header+list+composer layout: the kit's message-list root renders with inline `height:inherit` and its inner `.cometchat-message-list__body` uses `height:100%; overflow-y:auto`, so an app wrapper with no definite `height` collapses the scroller to the header height (~63px). The quickstart bundle only demonstrates the all-in-one `<CometChatConversationsWithMessages />` and never covers manual composition.
An empty-string docs-mcp query was issued (no useful retrieval), indicating either an agent query-construction artifact or a docs bundle that returns nothing on degenerate input.

blockers.issue: Web chat won't scroll — a custom overflow/height override on the kit wrapper clips the CometChat scroller (Playwright assert failed [chat.mjs]: W1: chat root collapsed to 63px)

docs-mcp / troubleshooting had no coverage for the manual-composition container-height scroller contract that caused the collapse; ground truth for the fix had to be reverse-engineered from the installed `@cometchat/chat-uikit-react/dist` bundle's inline styles rather than any skill or doc.

Latent same-class defect left unfixed: the sibling kit scroller panes `.cc-members` and `.cc-messages-list` depend on the identical `height:inherit`/`height:100%` chain but were deliberately left untouched. If those panes are used (conversation-list inbox, group members), they will collapse the same way the message list did. The agent scoped the fix to only the named 'chat root' without hardening the equivalent scrollers.

The collapse→fixed transition was not verified against the actual Playwright detector (chat.mjs) — it requires live CometChat credentials absent from the repo. The fix rests on CSS/flexbox reasoning plus a passing tsc+vite build, not observed runtime behavior, so the scroll fix is unconfirmed end-to-end.

improvement_suggestions.suggestion: Add a `cometchat-troubleshooting` entry titled 'Chat root collapses / message list won't scroll (hand-composed layout)': state that when embedding `CometChatMessageList`/`MessageHeader`/`MessageComposer` in an app-owned layout, every wrapper in the chain must expose a definite `height` (e.g. `height:100%` on a flex child, or a bounded flex parent) because the kit root renders with inline `height:inherit` and inner body uses `height:100%; overflow-y:auto`; `flex:1 1 0` alone does not resolve the percentage chain.
improvement_suggestions.motivated_by: docs-mcp / troubleshooting had no coverage for the manual-composition container-height scroller contract.

improvement_suggestions.suggestion: Add a docs-mcp page in the react-uikit bundle documenting the container-height contract for manual composition (header + list + composer), including the required definite-height chain and the `height:inherit` behavior of the kit root, so a docs query on 'message list won't scroll / container height' returns an authoritative answer instead of only the all-in-one quickstart component.
improvement_suggestions.motivated_by: docs-mcp / troubleshooting had no coverage for the manual-composition container-height scroller contract.

improvement_suggestions.suggestion: In the same troubleshooting entry, note that the definite-height requirement applies to ALL kit scroller panes — message list, conversation/inbox list, and members list — so integrators harden every embedded scroller rather than only the one that visibly broke first.
improvement_suggestions.motivated_by: Latent same-class defect left unfixed on `.cc-members` and `.cc-messages-list`.

auto_remediations.prompt_snippet:
# Phase B — Targeted Remediation (heal pass)

You already integrated CometChat into this app on branch
`feature/cometchat-integration`. An automated check caught a **specific, known
integration defect** in the code you committed. Your ONLY job now is to fix that
one defect — surgically — and nothing else.

This is **not** a re-integration. Do not redo the integration, do not restructure,
do not "improve" anything that is already working. Treat everything outside the
named defect as frozen.

## What was caught

The following detector(s) fired against your committed code:

- [W1] Web chat won't

_meta.agent_final_summary:
## INTEGRATION SUMMARY

- **Fixed:** [W1] Web chat won't scroll / chat root collapsed to 63px — `web/src/index.css`, `.cc-msg-list` rule: added `height: 100%` (single line) so the message-list flex pane exposes a definite `height` property. This gives the kit's own `CometChatMessageList` wrapper (rendered with inline `height: inherit`) a real value to inherit, which in turn lets the kit's inner `.cometchat-message-list` / `.cometchat-message-list__body` (`height: 100%`, `overflow-y: auto`) resolve a definite base and scroll instead of collapsing to content (≈ the 63px header). I did NOT set `overflow: hidden` or a fixed height on `.cometchat` or its wrapper; the wrapper stays bounded by the flex parent as the catalog prescribes. No other rules touched (call-overlay selectors, `.cc-thread-main`, etc. left frozen).

- **Root-cause detail (why the committed `flex: 1 1 0` wasn't enough):** I extracted the kit's real DOM from `@cometchat/chat-uikit-react/dist/index.js`: the message-list root is `<div class="cometchat" style="height:inherit;width:100%;overflow:hidden;box-sizing:border-box">` wrapping `.cometchat-message-list` (`height:100%`). `height: inherit` copies the parent's *computed* `height` property; `.cc-msg-list` declared no `height`, so it computed to `auto`, leaving the kit's `height:100%` scroller chain with no definite base. The committed `flex: 1 1 0` grows the wrapper but doesn't make that percentage chain resolve. Confirmed the header wrapper is `height: fit-content` (≈63px), matching the detector's exact number.

- **Skills/docs used:** `cometchat-troubleshooting` skill and `docs-mcp` (`react-uikit-quickstart` bundle, `search_cometchat_docs`) — **both were effectively silent / had a gap on this specific defect.** The troubleshooting table covers init/login/CSS-import/SSR/drift but has no entry for "chat root collapses / message list won't scroll / container height." The quickstart bundle demonstrates `<CometChatConversationsWithMessages />` and never documents the container-height contract for a hand-composed header+list+composer layout. Ground truth for the fix came from reading the installed kit bundle's actual inline styles, not the skills/docs. **This is a skill-gap signal: no CometChat skill or doc page addresses the manual-composition container-height / `height:inherit` scroller requirement.**

- **API/class/prop I was unsure existed:** none — no new CometChat API/class/prop was introduced; the change is pure CSS on an app-owned class. Kit class names referenced for diagnosis (`.cometchat`, `.cometchat-message-list`, `.cometchat-message-list__body`) were verified directly against the installed `dist` bundle/stylesheets, not assumed.

- **Web-search or guess fallback:** none. No web search used.

- **Still open:** Could not reproduce the Playwright detector (`chat.mjs`) headlessly — it's external to the repo and requires live CometChat credentials (only `.env.example` is present, no gitignored `.env`), so the collapse→fixed transition was verified by CSS/flexbox reasoning against the kit's real DOM plus the passing `tsc`+`vite build` gate, not by re-running the detector. The same `height:inherit`/`height:100%` dependency also exists on the sibling kit panes `.cc-members` and `.cc-messages-list`; I left them untouched to keep the diff minimal and scoped to the named "chat root" (message list) defect, but if the detector also checks the conversation-list or members-list scrollers, they'd need the identical one-line `height: 100%` hardening.
